<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Invoker\ParameterResolver; use ReflectionFunctionAbstract; /** * Simply returns all the values of the $providedParameters array that are * indexed by the parameter position (i.e. a number). * * E.g. `->call($callable, ['foo', 'bar'])` will simply resolve the parameters * to `['foo', 'bar']`. * * Parameters that are not indexed by a number (i.e. parameter position) * will be ignored. */ class NumericArrayResolver implements ParameterResolver { public function getParameters( ReflectionFunctionAbstract $reflection, array $providedParameters, array $resolvedParameters ): array { // Skip parameters already resolved if (! empty($resolvedParameters)) { $providedParameters = array_diff_key($providedParameters, $resolvedParameters); } foreach ($providedParameters as $key => $value) { if (is_int($key)) { $resolvedParameters[$key] = $value; } } return $resolvedParameters; } }
